blocks.text: Now let me run DESeq2 in R:

input.code:
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read counts and metadata
counts_df <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata_df <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

# Ensure counts are integers
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts_df)
counts_matrix <- matrix(as.integer(counts_matrix), nrow=nrow(counts_matrix), 
                        dimnames=list(rownames(counts_matrix), colnames(counts_matrix)))

# Convert metadata to factor with monocyte as reference
metadata_df$cell_type <- factor(metadata_df$cell_type, levels=c('Monocyte', 'T_cell'))

print(paste("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts_matrix), "genes ×", ncol(counts_matrix), "cells"))
print(paste("Metadata levels:", paste(levels(metadata_df$cell_type), collapse=' / ')))
print(table(metadata_df$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=counts_matrix,
                               colData=metadata_df,
                               design=~cell_type)

print(dds)
